message:
test(frankenpandas): add Element-Wise Operations integration test (br-itlgm / fd90.171)

fd90.171: locks in fd90.123's pct_change(1) signature fix plus the
broader scalar / df-to-df / cumulative arithmetic API documented in
the README's 'Element-Wise Operations' section (lines 1023-1054).

Builds two 4-row numeric DataFrames and exercises:
  Scalar arithmetic (6 fns):
    mul_scalar, add_scalar, div_scalar, pow_scalar, mod_scalar,
    floordiv_scalar
  DataFrame-to-DataFrame (3 fns):
    sub_df, div_df, mul_df — aligned arithmetic
  With fill value:
    add_df_fill — handles missing alignment positions
  Cumulative (4 fns):
    cumsum, cumprod, cummax, cummin
  Sequential (3 fns):
    diff(1), shift(1), pct_change(1)

The pct_change(1) call validates fd90.123's required-periods-arg fix
that originally read pct_change()? without the periods argument.

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 7 lib + 15 integration + 2 doctests
  all pass

Pure additive test. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
